context: Tests creation of a simple 3-node flowchart canvas with correct ID format, valid edge references, and proper JSON structure.

checklist.name: Valid JSON output
checklist.description: The canvas file content is syntactically valid JSON with no parse errors

checklist.name: Correct file extension
checklist.description: The output file is named with a .canvas extension (e.g. flowchart.canvas)

checklist.name: 16-character hex IDs on all nodes
checklist.description: Every node object has an id field that is exactly 16 lowercase hexadecimal characters

checklist.name: 16-character hex IDs on all edges
checklist.description: Every edge object has an id field that is exactly 16 lowercase hexadecimal characters

checklist.name: All edge references resolve
checklist.description: Both fromNode and toNode values on every edge match an id present in the nodes array

checklist.name: Three nodes present
checklist.description: Canvas contains exactly three text nodes representing Start, Decision, and End
